name: Macaronada
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons Grated cheese (Kefalotyri, Romano, or Parmesan)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil with salt and oil.
2. Keep the water boiling briskly. Add a handful of pasta at a time, pushing it in slowly as the strands soften and curl around the sides of the pan.
3. Stir well after each addition, then continue boiling briskly, stirring occasionally.
4. Cook until just tender—test by biting a piece.
5. Drain well in a colander and return to the pan in which it was cooked.
6. Melt butter over low heat until deep golden brown. Do not burn.
7. Pour the melted butter over the pasta, add grated cheese, and toss well to coat the strands.
8. Serve extra grated cheese in a bowl.
